name: delegate
description: Delegate heavy or token-expensive tasks from Claude Code to Codex CLI (GPT) and Antigravity CLI (Gemini), with an optional Claude CLI third voter. Dispatch a self-contained prompt to an external CLI, write the output to a file, and read only the STATUS/VERDICT header to keep the main context clean. Good for code implementation, debugging, refactoring, proof and derivation checking, literature review, and second-opinion cross-checks.
